default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Discern and GrowthX to discuss content production, SEO efforts, and Webflow access issues.](https://fathom.video/share/9K6jgMAzNxfMU6d8VFo6iZ6xF5H3iZ5K?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content quality is improving, with more concise, accurate articles and working links](https://fathom.video/share/9K6jgMAzNxfMU6d8VFo6iZ6xF5H3iZ5K?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Webflow access issues resolved, allowing for better SEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/9K6jgMAzNxfMU6d8VFo6iZ6xF5H3iZ5K?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [New dashboard in development to track metrics, including LLM traffic from sources like Perplexity and Gemini](https://fathom.video/share/9K6jgMAzNxfMU6d8VFo6iZ6xF5H3iZ5K?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
  - [19 articles pending review; publishing will be staggered to avoid appearing "shifty"](https://fathom.video/share/9K6jgMAzNxfMU6d8VFo6iZ6xF5H3iZ5K?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Progress

  - [Jenny (CM) fully ramped up, handling full article load](https://fathom.video/share/9K6jgMAzNxfMU6d8VFo6iZ6xF5H3iZ5K?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [Ade onboarding, has relevant experience from Harbor Compliance](https://fathom.video/share/9K6jgMAzNxfMU6d8VFo6iZ6xF5H3iZ5K?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
  - [19 articles pending Mike's review, 19 published](https://fathom.video/share/9K6jgMAzNxfMU6d8VFo6iZ6xF5H3iZ5K?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [Goal: Refine workflow to reduce manual review burden](https://fathom.video/share/9K6jgMAzNxfMU6d8VFo6iZ6xF5H3iZ5K?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
  - [Fact-checking process improved, focusing on official state websites](https://fathom.video/share/9K6jgMAzNxfMU6d8VFo6iZ6xF5H3iZ5K?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)

### SEO and Site Performance

  - [Site health at 88%, with upward trend in traffic](https://fathom.video/share/9K6jgMAzNxfMU6d8VFo6iZ6xF5H3iZ5K?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
  - [68% engagement rate for organic search traffic](https://fathom.video/share/9K6jgMAzNxfMU6d8VFo6iZ6xF5H3iZ5K?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [Implementing article and author schema recommended](https://fathom.video/share/9K6jgMAzNxfMU6d8VFo6iZ6xF5H3iZ5K?tab=summary&timestamp=2030.0)
  - [Most pages indexing well, with one exception (Wisconsin Franchise Tax page)](https://fathom.video/share/9K6jgMAzNxfMU6d8VFo6iZ6xF5H3iZ5K?tab=summary&timestamp=2110.0)
  - [New dashboard in development for easier metric tracking](https://fathom.video/share/9K6jgMAzNxfMU6d8VFo6iZ6xF5H3iZ5K?tab=summary&timestamp=2317.0)

### Webflow Access Resolution

  - [Initially, Carrie had limited access (content editor only)](https://fathom.video/share/9K6jgMAzNxfMU6d8VFo6iZ6xF5H3iZ5K?tab=summary&timestamp=1768.0)
  - [Mike removed and re-added GrowthX Labs team with designer permissions](https://fathom.video/share/9K6jgMAzNxfMU6d8VFo6iZ6xF5H3iZ5K?tab=summary&timestamp=2151.0)
  - [Issue resolved, allowing for better SEO optimization capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/9K6jgMAzNxfMU6d8VFo6iZ6xF5H3iZ5K?tab=summary&timestamp=2219.0)

### LLM Traffic Insights

  - [New dashboard tracking LLM traffic from sources like Perplexity and Gemini](https://fathom.video/share/9K6jgMAzNxfMU6d8VFo6iZ6xF5H3iZ5K?tab=summary&timestamp=2344.0)
  - [Currently small but expected to grow with more content](https://fathom.video/share/9K6jgMAzNxfMU6d8VFo6iZ6xF5H3iZ5K?tab=summary&timestamp=2380.0)
  - [Citing official sources (e.g., Secretary of State websites) may improve LLM accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/9K6jgMAzNxfMU6d8VFo6iZ6xF5H3iZ5K?tab=summary&timestamp=2423.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mike to review pending 19 articles](https://fathom.video/share/9K6jgMAzNxfMU6d8VFo6iZ6xF5H3iZ5K?tab=summary&timestamp=1264.0)
  - [Carrie to stagger publication of approved articles](https://fathom.video/share/9K6jgMAzNxfMU6d8VFo6iZ6xF5H3iZ5K?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
  - [Implement article and author schema on content pages](https://fathom.video/share/9K6jgMAzNxfMU6d8VFo6iZ6xF5H3iZ5K?tab=summary&timestamp=2030.0)
  - [Investigate and resolve Wisconsin Franchise Tax page indexing issue](https://fathom.video/share/9K6jgMAzNxfMU6d8VFo6iZ6xF5H3iZ5K?tab=summary&timestamp=2110.0)
  - [Dave to finalize new dashboard within a week](https://fathom.video/share/9K6jgMAzNxfMU6d8VFo6iZ6xF5H3iZ5K?tab=summary&timestamp=2448.0)
  - [Continue monitoring and optimizing for LLM traffic](https://fathom.video/share/9K6jgMAzNxfMU6d8VFo6iZ6xF5H3iZ5K?tab=summary&timestamp=2408.0)

action_items.description: Review 19 pending content pieces for approval
Contact Webflow support re: site-specific permission issues
Schedule approved content for staggered publishing (few per category daily)
Investigate indexing issue w/ Wisconsin Franchise Tax page
Implement separate H1 & meta title changes w/ new design access
Finalize & launch new dashboard report w/ LLM traffic data (~1 week)
